calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Continued To Dec-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Reed Harvey appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court questions why probate is needed for such a low estate. Mr. Harvey stated that they filed for probate in an abundance of caution, that there are some creditors as well as a restitution order from the Federal Court, that there are over $1,000,000.00 in tax liens, and that a 401k and an insurance policy normally pass outside of probate, but they want to make sure to provide notice to the creditors and that everything is done correctly. Mr. Harvey also addressed bond stating that the estate is at $1,700.00, that it is a very small estate, and that the IRS or the Department of Justice may want access to the 401k or the insurance. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant. The court will waive bond.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
